sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, text String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'Hello, ClickHouse!'), (2, 'Fuzzing SQL statements');
SELECT id, left(text, 5) AS substr FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_strings SET text = left(text, -8) WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, left(text, 10) AS substr FROM test_strings WHERE length(text) > 10;
